storage_contract.write: storage.upsertBrandDomain({ brand, category, official_domain, aliases, support_domain, confidence })

caller_gates: runDiscoverySeedPlan() only attempts resolution when a brand is present
runDiscoverySeedPlan() only creates callLlmFn when hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) is true
discoverCandidateSources() only calls the resolver when no precomputed brandResolution was passed in
